assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement and AddClient with DPoPJsonWebKey set on the client options
assertions.rationale: Does not use AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement at all. Manually constructs HttpClient and FormUrlEncodedContent instead.
Line 28 uses the URL https://identity.example.com/connect/token in the request.

assertions.assertion: Shows JWK generation using RsaSecurityKey with RSA.Create(2048) and JsonWebKeyConverter.ConvertFromSecurityKey, with Alg set to PS256
assertions.rationale: Uses RSA.Create(2048) and JsonWebKeyConverter but sets Alg to RS256 instead of PS256.

assertions.assertion: Warns that the DPoPJsonWebKey is a critical secret — losing it makes bound tokens unusable, leaking it nullifies DPoP security
assertions.rationale: Mentions losing the key makes tokens unusable (line 55) but does not warn about the leaking risk that nullifies DPoP security.
